subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Dec. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: Disease is of two kinds: (a) Material (b) Spiritual. For instance, a cut of the hand; if you pray for the cut to be healed
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @power of prayer, @symbolism, @miracles and their interpretation
